/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.4 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/VendingMachine_tst.dir/CMakeFiles/3.24.2/CompilerIdCXX/CMakeCXXCompilerId.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VendingMachine_tst.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VendingMachine_tst.dir/vending_machine_test.cpp.o -o VendingMachine_tst  ../src/libVendingMachine_lib.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgmock.a ../lib/libgtest.a
